display_text: Mars Aghanim's Scepter: Bulwark — Creates invulnerable soldiers that counter melee attackers and dive-heavy lineups by knocking back and slowing approaching enemies, transforming Mars into an anti-physical frontline fortress that punishes enemy engagement.
search_text: Mars Aghanim Scepter Bulwark anti-physical knockback slow frontline defense soldier summons

display_text: Mars Aghanim's Shard: Spear of Mars — Counters grouped enemy formations by impaling multiple heroes and creating a fire trail that slows and damages, enhancing Mars' initiation and zoning potential against clustered teams.
search_text: Mars Aghanim Shard Spear of Mars multi-hero impale fire trail slow AoE control initiation
